items.placeName: Hi Coffee - 11 Trần Hưng Đạo - Phú Quốc

facebook.caption: Tucked along the main strip of Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Hi Coffee is the kind of spot that earns a 4.8 from 257 reviewers for very good reason. Whether you need a strong Vietnamese iced coffee to kick off a beach day or a quiet corner to plan your afternoon, this little café delivers on both fronts. Practical tip: it sits right on the island's busiest road, so it makes a perfect pitstop between sightseeing and the night market. Drop in, cool down, and stay longer than you planned.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the condensation drip down that iced coffee glass and tell us you're not already craving one. Hi Coffee on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is serving up the kind of laid-back café energy that foreign visitors absolutely fall for in Phu Quoc. Rated 4.8 from 257 reviews, and the vibe backs every single star.

instagram.caption: Your mid-island recharge, sorted. Hi Coffee on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo pulls a 4.8 from 257 reviews, and one sip of their iced Vietnamese coffee will tell you exactly why. Great stop between the beach and Chợ đêm Phú Quốc.
instagram.video_caption: Cold coffee, warm vibes, and a 4.8 rating that speaks for itself. Hi Coffee is the kind of Phu Quoc café you wander into once and keep coming back to.

tiktok.caption: Rated 4.8 and worth every star. Hi Coffee on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is your must-stop café in Phu Quoc. #HiCoffee #PhuQuocVietnam #VietnamCoffee #CafeHopping

video_script.hook: Best café stop in Phu Quoc?

items.placeName: The Spice House Restaurant at Cassia Cottage Phu Quoc

facebook.caption: Tucked inside the garden grounds of Cassia Cottage, The Spice House Restaurant brings together fresh local ingredients and bold Vietnamese flavors in a setting that feels a world away from the busier resort strips. With a 4.7/5 rating across nearly 700 reviews, it has clearly won over a lot of hungry visitors. Come for the food, stay for the relaxed tropical atmosphere. Practical tip: reservations are recommended, especially during dinner hours when tables fill up fast.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the light filter through the garden as plates of vibrant Vietnamese food land on the table. The Spice House Restaurant at Cassia Cottage is one of those spots that looks as good as it tastes, and the 4.7/5 rating from almost 700 guests backs that up. Worth every bite.

instagram.caption: Garden vibes, bold flavors, and a 4.7/5 rating that speaks for itself. The Spice House Restaurant at Cassia Cottage is a beautiful escape from the busier end of Trần Hưng Đạo. Book ahead for dinner and thank yourself later.
instagram.video_caption: Lush garden setting, stunning plates, and Vietnamese flavors done right. The Spice House Restaurant at Cassia Cottage is giving us every reason to linger over a long, slow dinner.

tiktok.caption: A garden restaurant in Phu Quoc with a 4.7 rating and Vietnamese food this good? The Spice House at Cassia Cottage deserves a spot on your list. #PhuQuoc #VietnamFood #SpiceHousePhuQuoc #TravelVietnam #FoodTok

video_script.hook: Best kept dining secret in Phu Quoc?
scenes: Close up: herbs, spices, vibrant colors

facebook.caption: With 602 reviews and a 4.7/5 rating, Nhà hàng Thì Là Restaurant on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is one of those spots that keeps earning its reputation the honest way. Sitting right in the heart of Khu 1, it's an easy stop whether you're exploring the main strip or heading back from the beach. Expect authentic Vietnamese cooking, the kind that feels home-style rather than tourist-adjusted. Tip: it's popular for good reason, so arriving a little early for dinner helps you avoid a wait.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the dishes land on the table and you'll understand why Nhà hàng Thì Là Restaurant pulls in crowds night after night. The food looks as good as the reviews suggest, 4.7 stars across 602 ratings. Find it at 41 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo in Khu 1 and see for yourself.

instagram.caption: 4.7 stars. 602 reviews. Nhà hàng Thì Là Restaurant in Khu 1 is clearly doing something right. Authentic Vietnamese flavors, a central spot on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, and a loyal crowd to match. Go a little early for dinner.
instagram.video_caption: Plates arriving, chopsticks ready. Nhà hàng Thì Là Restaurant earns every one of its 602 reviews. Real Vietnamese food, right in the heart of Phu Quoc.

tiktok.caption: 602 reviews at 4.7 stars. Nhà hàng Thì Là Restaurant in Phu Quoc is the real deal. Go early, eat well. #PhuQuoc #VietnameseFood #VietnamTravel #FoodTok

items.placeName: Cua 350 – Crab Noodle Soup Phu Quoc

facebook.caption: A 4.9-star rating from 113 reviews says everything you need to know about Cua 350 in Phu Quoc. This cozy bistro is the go-to spot for crab noodle soup, a dish that captures the soul of Vietnamese coastal cooking in a single bowl. Rich, fragrant broth, fresh crab, and silky noodles make it a must-try for any food lover visiting the island. Find it at 38 Đ. 30 Tháng 4, and go early as bowls tend to sell out fast. A practical tip: point to what locals are having if you need help ordering.
facebook.video_caption: Watch that golden broth get ladled over a generous pile of crab and noodles at Cua 350, and you will understand why this little bistro has a near-perfect rating. The clips say it all: fresh crab, fragrant steam, happy faces. Head to 38 Đ. 30 Tháng 4 and see for yourself.

instagram.caption: Cua 350 is serving up some of Phu Quoc's finest crab noodle soup, and a 4.9-star rating from 113 reviewers backs that up. Fresh crab, golden broth, silky noodles. Go early before it sells out.
instagram.video_caption: Golden broth. Fresh crab. Pure comfort in a bowl. Cua 350 is the real deal, and this 4.9-rated bistro might just be your best meal on the island. Don't sleep on it.

tiktok.caption: 4.9 stars for crab noodle soup in Phu Quoc? Yes please. Cua 350 is the real deal, go early before it's gone. #PhuQuocFood #CrabNoodleSoup #VietnamEats #PhuQuoc

scenes: Fresh crab, straight from the pot
Golden broth poured over silk noodles
A local bistro with serious fans
video_script.cta: Go early. Bowls sell out fast.

facebook.caption: With a 4.8/5 rating from nearly 740 reviews, Bơ restaurant & coffee on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is clearly doing something right. Sitting on one of Phu Quoc's busiest strips, this spot earns consistent love from visitors who keep coming back. Whether you're stopping in for a slow morning coffee or a proper sit-down meal, it's the kind of place that feels easy and welcoming from the moment you walk in. Tip: a crowd-favorite like this fills up, so aim to arrive a little early during meal times to snag a good table.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the tables fill up fast at Bơ restaurant & coffee, and you'll understand why this place has nearly 740 five-star moments behind it. Drinks arriving, plates landing, guests settling in. On Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, this is the kind of stop that turns a quick break into a full-on highlight of your Phu Quoc day.

instagram.caption: 4.8 stars, 739 reviews, and a spot on Phu Quoc's most iconic street. Bơ restaurant & coffee at Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is a no-brainer stop for food, coffee, and a proper rest. Get there a little early, trust the crowd.
instagram.video_caption: Nearly 740 reviews don't lie. Bơ restaurant & coffee is the kind of place you stumble into once and immediately add to your Phu Quoc must-return list. Coffee, food, good vibes.

tiktok.caption: 4.8 stars on Phu Quoc's busiest street. Bơ restaurant & coffee is the real deal. Go early, thank us later. #PhuQuoc #VietnamFood #TravelVietnam #PhuQuocEats

facebook.caption: If you're looking for a sit-down meal that feels genuinely local on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Anna's Nhà Cuốn Restaurant is worth a stop. The name says it all — 'nhà cuốn' means rolling house, pointing straight to Vietnamese fresh rolls as the heart of the menu. With a 4.7/5 rating across 340 reviews, this spot has clearly won over plenty of travelers. Come hungry, go slow, and don't skip the dipping sauces.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the table fill up with fresh rolls, herbs, and dipping bowls at Anna's Nhà Cuốn Restaurant. This is hands-on eating at its best, wrapping, dipping, and discovering flavors that are hard to find back home. One of the most consistently loved spots on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, and the 4.7-star rating from 340 reviewers backs that up.

instagram.caption: Fresh rolls, fragrant herbs, and a 4.7-star reputation. Anna's Nhà Cuốn Restaurant on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is your sign to eat local tonight. Practical tip: come with an appetite and a little patience, good things take a moment to wrap.
instagram.video_caption: Rolling, wrapping, dipping. Anna's Nhà Cuốn Restaurant puts the fun right in your hands. One of Phu Quoc's most loved local dining spots and honestly, the food speaks for itself.

tiktok.caption: This little restaurant on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo just hits different. Anna's Nhà Cuốn Restaurant, 4.7 stars, 340 reviews, and you can taste why. #PhuQuoc #VietnameseFood #FreshRolls #PhuQuocFood

Wrap it, dip it, love it

items.placeName: On The Rock Restaurant & Beach Bar

facebook.caption: If you're looking for a meal with serious atmosphere, On The Rock Restaurant & Beach Bar delivers exactly that. Tucked into Mango Bay on Hẻm 8 Đường Lê Thúc Nha, this spot earns its name with rocky, open-air seating right at the water's edge. Rated 4.3/5 across 442 reviews, it's a consistent favourite for visitors wanting good food and great views in one place. Practical tip: aim for sunset if you can grab a table, and book ahead since waterfront spots fill up fast in Phu Quoc.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the waves roll in right beside your table at On The Rock Restaurant & Beach Bar. The open-air setting at Mango Bay is something you just have to see to believe. Rocks, sea, sky, and a cold drink in hand. This is what dining in Phu Quoc actually looks like.

instagram.caption: Dinner at the water's edge, literally. On The Rock Restaurant & Beach Bar at Mango Bay is one of those Phu Quoc spots that earns its 4.3/5 rating on atmosphere alone. Book ahead and go at sunset.
instagram.video_caption: Waves crashing, sea breeze blowing, cold drink arriving. On The Rock Restaurant & Beach Bar at Mango Bay is the vibe you came to Phu Quoc for.

tiktok.caption: Dining on actual rocks above the sea in Phu Quoc. On The Rock Restaurant & Beach Bar at Mango Bay is worth every bit of that 4.3 rating. #PhuQuoc #BeachBar #VietnamTravel #IslandFood

video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip!

items.placeName: Bò Tơ Phú Quốc - Bò Tơ 68 (100C Trần Hưng Đạo)

facebook.caption: Not every great meal in Phu Quoc comes with an ocean view, and Bò Tơ Phú Quốc - Bò Tơ 68 on Trần Hưng Đạo is proof of that. This local favourite specialises in bò tơ, tender young beef that is a regional staple you rarely find on tourist menus. With a 4.8 out of 5 from nearly 3,000 reviews, the locals have clearly voted. Come hungry, point at what neighbouring tables are having, and let the kitchen do the rest. Practical tip: arrive before 11:30 am or after 1:30 pm to beat the lunch crowd.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the steam rise off the bowl and you will understand why this place pulls nearly 3,000 five-star reviews. Bò Tơ Phú Quốc - Bò Tơ 68 serves young beef the way Phu Quoc locals actually eat it, no tourist markup, no fuss. Find it at 100C Trần Hưng Đạo and order whatever the table next to you is having.

instagram.caption: Tender young beef, a packed local dining room, and a 4.8-star rating built entirely by regulars. Bò Tơ Phú Quốc - Bò Tơ 68 on Trần Hưng Đạo is the kind of place that reminds you the best meals rarely need an ocean view. Go before the lunch rush.
instagram.video_caption: Steaming bowls, packed tables, happy locals. Bò Tơ Phú Quốc - Bò Tơ 68 is where Phu Quoc residents actually eat, and after one visit you will know exactly why.

tiktok.caption: 4.8 stars, 2,864 reviews, zero tourist traps. Bò Tơ Phú Quốc - Bò Tơ 68 is where locals eat on Phu Quoc. 🍖 #PhuQuoc #VietnamFood #LocalEats #FoodTok

scenes: Arrive before 11:30 am for a seat
video_script.cta: Save this for your food list!

items.placeName: The Home Pizza Tran Hung Dao

facebook.caption: With 7,116 reviews and a 4.8-star rating, The Home Pizza Tran Hung Dao on 129 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is clearly doing something right. This cozy spot is a genuine crowd-pleaser for visitors craving a wood-fired break between beach days. The relaxed vibe, solid menu, and consistent quality make it one of the most trusted dining stops on the strip. Practical tip: it gets busy in the evening, so arriving before 6 PM or booking ahead saves you the wait.
facebook.video_caption: Bubbling cheese, golden crusts, and a dining room packed with happy faces. The Home Pizza Tran Hung Dao earns its 4.8 stars every single service. Watch the slices disappear and you will understand why over 7,000 people took the time to leave a five-star review.

instagram.caption: 4.8 stars. 7,116 reviews. The Home Pizza Tran Hung Dao at 129 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo keeps delivering. A reliable, crowd-loved pizza stop that fits perfectly into any Phu Quoc itinerary. Get there before 6 PM to beat the dinner rush.
instagram.video_caption: Golden crust, melty cheese, packed tables. The Home Pizza Tran Hung Dao has 7,116 fans for a very good reason. This is your sign to add it to the list.

tiktok.caption: 7,116 reviews and 4.8 stars at The Home Pizza Tran Hung Dao in Phu Quoc. Go before 6 PM to skip the crowd. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #VietnamTravel #PizzaNight

facebook.caption: With 2,240 reviews and a 4.7/5 rating, Bếp An Restaurant on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is clearly doing something right. Sitting right along Phu Quoc's main strip, it draws a loyal crowd of both locals and travelers looking for a genuine Vietnamese meal without the tourist-trap pricing. The name 'Bếp An' roughly translates to 'peaceful kitchen,' and that warm, unhurried vibe comes through in the experience. Practical tip: arrive before 7 pm to beat the dinner rush and snag a good table.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the tables fill up fast at Bếp An Restaurant, one of the most consistently loved spots on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. The kitchen moves quickly, the dishes land looking exactly like something you want after a long day exploring Phu Quoc. Nearly 2,300 people gave it a 4.7 and honestly, the vibe in these clips says it all.

instagram.caption: 4.7 stars across 2,240 reviews. Bếp An Restaurant on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is the kind of place locals keep returning to and visitors keep recommending. Come hungry, come early, and let the kitchen do the rest.
instagram.video_caption: Busy tables, great smells, happy faces. Bếp An Restaurant earns its 4.7 the honest way, one plate at a time. This one belongs on your Phu Quoc food list.

tiktok.caption: 4.7 stars, 2,240 reviews. Bếp An Restaurant in Phu Quoc is the real deal. Go early! #PhuQuoc #VietnamFood #TravelEats #Foodie

items.placeName: Huong Bien Restaurant - Vietnamese Cuisine & Seafood

facebook.caption: Sitting right on 1 Võ Thị Sáu in the heart of Phú Quốc, Huong Bien Restaurant has earned a seriously loyal following, 4.7 out of 5 stars across 758 reviews. This is the kind of Vietnamese seafood spot where the menu feels honest and the portions feel generous. Fresh catches, classic preparations, and a crowd that clearly keeps coming back. Practical tip: arrive before 7 pm to beat the dinner rush and snag a comfortable table.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the dishes land on the table at Huong Bien Restaurant and you will understand exactly why 758 reviewers gave it a 4.7. The colours, the steam, the seafood pulled straight from Phú Quốc waters. This is Vietnamese coastal cooking doing exactly what it does best.

instagram.caption: Huong Bien Restaurant in Phú Quốc, 4.7 stars from 758 reviews and a plate of seafood that needs zero filter. Fresh, local, and deeply satisfying. Get there before 7 pm for the best seat in the house.
instagram.video_caption: Fresh seafood, 758 happy reviewers, and a 4.7-star rating that speaks for itself. Huong Bien Restaurant is giving Phú Quốc coastal dining its best look yet.

tiktok.caption: 758 reviews and a 4.7 rating at Huong Bien Restaurant in Phú Quốc. This is the seafood spot you did not know you needed. #PhuQuoc #VietnamFood #SeafoodLovers #PhuQuocEats
